_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: In contrast to the MET-addicted tumors, few, if any, signaling dependencies were present in the capmatinib-treated NF1-P53 tumorgrafts. the pace and strength of kinome adaptations in NF1-P53 tumors were considerably reduced
details: Few if any signaling dependencies present in capmatinib treatment, with reduced pace and strength of kinome adaptations compared to other models
